name: Anonymous
history: Brother died by suicide when the patient was young. Ongoing family conflict about discussing the loss. Parents initially did not allow the patient to seek talk therapy after the death.
intermediate_belief: If I express my true feelings, I will be seen as a troublemaker.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't trust my own perceptions because others don't validate them.
coping_strategies: Minimizing emotions and presenting them in a mild way to avoid feeling vulnerable.
situation: Noticing that the brother's birthday is approaching.
auto_thought: Am I the only one who knows that this is really stupid?
behavior: Avoids expressing strong emotions openly and questions her own perceptions.
